checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Letter of complainant to SP/ CM
Verification and certification of non-forum shopping

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the letter and pertinent documents
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Accept the letter and other documents
steps.person_responsible: Local Legislative Staff Assistant I, Office of the Sangguniang Panlungsod

steps.client_step: None
steps.agency_action: 1.2. Scan all documents and encode in Legislative Tracking System
steps.person_responsible: Local Legislative Staff Employee II, Local Legislative Staff Employee I, Local Legislative Staff Assistant II, Office of the Sangguniang Panlungsod

steps.client_step: None
steps.agency_action: 1.3. Include in the session’s agenda
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer II, Office of the Sangguniang Panlungsod

steps.client_step: None
steps.agency_action: 1.4. Conduct session and refer subject to appropriate committees (1st reading)
steps.person_responsible: Members of the Sangguniang Panlungsod, Office of the Sangguniang Panlungsod

steps.client_step: None
steps.agency_action: 1.5. Prepare letter requiring respondents to submit verified answer to the complaint within 10 days from receipt thereof to the Office of the SP
steps.person_responsible: Board Secretary IV, Office of the Sangguniang Panlungsod

steps.client_step: 2. Attend hearing
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Conduct of pre-hearing conference, formal investigation, deliberation of committee, study, drafting and approval of final decision
steps.person_responsible: SP Secretary, Members of the Sangguniang Panlungsod, Local Legislative Staff Officer V, Office of the Sangguniang Panlungsod

steps.client_step: None
steps.agency_action: 2.2. Print resolution and forward to Administrative Division
steps.person_responsible: Local Legislative Staff Officer III, Local Legislative Staff Assistant II, Administrative Assistant I, Office of the Sangguniang Panlungsod

steps.client_step: 3. Provide signed copy of ordinance or resolution
steps.agency_action: 3. Provide copy of signed resolutions to concerned offices/ agencies
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant II, Administrative Officer II, Office of the Sangguniang Panlungsod

external_services.service_name: Acting on Land Use Related Requests
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
who_may_avail: government and non-government agencies and organizations

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Letter of City Administrator to SP (Reclassification)

checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Planning and Development Office
Lipa City Planning and Development Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Letter of Lot Owner/requester to City Mayor

checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Assessor’s Office or Register of Deeds
Barangay where the property is located

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Certification of No Objection from the City Mayor (Special Use)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the letter of request and pertinent documents
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Accept the letter and other documents
steps.person_responsible: Local Legislative Staff Assistant I

steps.client_step: None
steps.agency_action: 1.6. Review the submitted documents
steps.person_responsible: Local Legislative Staff Officer IV, Administrative Officer III, Local Legislative Staff Officer II

steps.client_step: 3. Attend the scheduled hearing and justify their request to the committee
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Attend the proceedings and prepare the minutes
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant V, Administrative Assistant I

external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
who_may_avail: government and non-government agencies and organizations

steps.client_step: 1. Accomplish the System Inquiry Form and submit the same to the LCSPO or e-mail to the Standing Committees Division regarding their request for status validation
steps.agency_action: 1. Receive the System Inquiry Form, verify the status of subject and forward the same to the concerned division
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Local Legislative Staff Assistant I, Local Legislative Staff Assistant II, Administrative Assistant I, Administrative Assistant II, Administrative Officer II

steps.client_step: 2. Receive the verified System Inquiry Form with the details requested and sign the Receipt Slip
steps.agency_action: 2. Release the verified System Inquiry Form to the client and have them sign the Receipt Slip
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Local Legislative Staff Assistant I

external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
who_may_avail: Any individual, company, organization, institution or agency

steps.client_step: 1. Accomplish Document Request Form and submit the same to the LCSPO
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive the certification request form
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant II, Administrative Assistant I

steps.client_step: None
steps.agency_action: 1.2. Make/ print the requested certification and forward the same for signature to the SP Secretary
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant II, Supervising Administrative Officer, SP Secretary

steps.client_step: 2. Receive the certification and sign the receipt slip
steps.agency_action: 2. Release the certification to the client
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant II, Administrative Assistant I

external_services.service_name: Request for Certified True Copy of Documents
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Certified True Copy of Documents
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
who_may_avail: Any individual, company, organization, institution or agency

steps.client_step: 1. Accomplish Document Request Form and submit the same to the LCSPO
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive the document request form and forward to concerned divisions
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant II, Administrative Officer II, and division staff

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Order of Payment and pay the Secretary’s fee at the City Treasurer’s Office
steps.agency_action: 3. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II, City Treasurer’s Office

steps.client_step: 5. Receive the document and sign the Receipt Slip
steps.agency_action: 5. Release the document to the client
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant II, Administrative Officer II

who_may_avail: government and non-government agencies and organizations

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Letter and Contract/ MOA/ MOU for Authority or Ratification
Deed of Donation with Technical Description
Position Paper/ Organizational Structure (Creation of Position)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the request letter and supporting documents
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive and 1.2. Scan/Encode
steps.person_responsible: Local Legislative Staff assistants

steps.client_step: 3. Attend the scheduled hearing and justify their request to the committee
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Attend proceedings and 3.2. Evaluate request
steps.person_responsible: Chairperson and members of the Committee, Administrative staff

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Endorsement from City Budget Office (for Budgets)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the request letter and pertinent documents
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive and 1.2. Scan/Encode documents
steps.person_responsible: Local Legislative Staff assistants

steps.client_step: 3. Attend the scheduled hearing and justify their request
steps.agency_action: 3.2. Evaluate request (Barangay Budget/Ordinance)
steps.person_responsible: Chairperson and members of the Committee

total.processing_time: 8 days to 21 days, 6 hours and 15 minutes
